name: Hannibal Lecter
description:
Aγάπη.

[Agape]. Greek.

(N.) The highest form of love. Selfless, sacrificial and unconditional love. It transcends and persists no matter the circumstances. 

A pity nobody told Hannibal you can experience this feeling for someone.
